title: Akasa Air flight diverted to Lucknow; runs short on fuel, lands under full emergency
content: An Akasa Air flight from Bengaluru to Bhubaneswar declared a 'PAN PAN' call due to low fuel and bad weather, prompting a full emergency at Lucknow airport. The Boeing 737 MAX 8, carrying 194 passengers and crew, landed safely after diverting. Emergency services were on standby, but the aircraft required no assistance and later prepared to continue its journey.

title: 'Get out fast or ... ': How Bengal govt plans to mass deport illegal immigrants
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari has announced a new "detect-delete-deport" policy targeting illegal immigrants, including Bangladeshis and Rohingyas. The state is establishing "holding centres" across districts to temporarily house apprehended foreigners before repatriation, with two centres already operational in Murshidabad and Malda.

title: Former Google CEO says: Top engineers are no longer writing most of the code themselves
content: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt declared the era of manual coding over, stating that modern programmers now supervise AI agents. This significant shift, beginning around October last year, sees engineers assigning tasks to AI 'friends' and reviewing their output. Schmidt urged tech leaders to question traditional coding practices, emphasizing that outdated methods are now obsolete.

title: Happy Eid-ul-Adha 2026: Best Eid Mubarak wishes for friends, family, teachers and colleagues
content: Eid-ul-Adha mornings are a beautiful, chaotic blend of family, food, and festive spirit. This guide offers perfect wishes for every relationship, from family group chats to professional colleagues. Whether you're aiming for heartfelt, humorous, or practical, these ready-to-use messages ensure you connect meaningfully during the celebrations.

title: Sidda vs DKS: Why Congress faces its toughest balancing act in Karnataka
content: Karnataka's Congress faces a leadership crisis as Chief Minister Siddaramaiah and Deputy CM D.K. Shivakumar's power struggle intensifies. The party high command is exploring options, including a potential national role for Siddaramaiah, to avert a political fallout and maintain stability, while speculation of mid-term polls looms.

title: 'If I had gone towards...': Sooryavanshi reveals how he missed fastest IPL century
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi delivered a stunning 97 off 29 balls in the IPL 2026 Eliminator. The fifteen-year-old Rajasthan Royals opener played fearlessly against Sunrisers Hyderabad. His innings included twelve sixes, breaking Chris Gayle's record for most sixes in a season. Sooryavanshi's performance is already being compared to legendary IPL knocks.

title: Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
content: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.

title: Hyderabad techie’s body to remain on Everest as recovery costs hit Rs 90 lakh
content: A Hyderabad tech professional's family has chosen to leave his body on Mount Everest, citing faith and the extreme difficulty of recovery from the 'death zone'. The recovery cost was quoted at nearly Rs 90 lakh, twice the summiting fee. He died descending near Hillary Step after reaching the peak.

title: Poor nighttime cooling disrupts sleep & increases risk of heat stroke: Expert
content: Mumbai is witnessing an alarming increase in sultry nights, with numbers more than doubling since the recent past. This phenomenon, heightened by urban heat island effects and lingering humidity after the monsoon, threatens public health by interfering with essential sleep and recovery processes.

title: Radar, jammers & hard-kill guns: Inside India's anti-drone swarm system
content: At the forefront of modern defense, India is enhancing its security measures against aerial threats with the unveiling of Zen Technologies' advanced AI-driven counter-drone system at the North Tech Symposium 2026. This homegrown innovation integrates comprehensive detection, disruption, and neutralization strategies, effectively tackling the complexities of contemporary drone warfare.

title: Cloudflare lays off 1,100 employees; CEO says company isn’t struggling
content: Cloudflare is laying off over 1,100 employees, about 20% of its workforce, to restructure around AI adoption. CEO Matthew Prince explained the cuts target 'measurers' – roles like middle management and operations – as AI enhances efficiency. He believes AI will boost productivity for 'builders' and 'sellers', allowing greater investment in growth areas.

title: Tears in Sooryavanshi’s eyes after nearly missing fastest IPL century - Watch
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi delivered a sensational 97 off 29 balls in an IPL playoff, narrowly missing a historic century. Despite shattering records for most sixes (65) and runs by an uncapped batter (680), the young prodigy's visible heartbreak after falling short resonated deeply, highlighting the immense pressure and passion of the game.

title: Gujarat woman kills 3 children, then attempts suicide after husband discovers affair
content: A woman in Valsad has been booked for allegedly poisoning and strangling her three children before attempting suicide. Police investigations revealed the crime followed a domestic dispute over the wife's suspected extramarital affair. The woman is currently hospitalized and undergoing treatment.

title: Ebola scare: Man from Congo, 3 others isolated in Ahmedabad; samples sent for testing
content: A man from Congo and three contacts have been isolated in Ahmedabad for Ebola testing. This follows intensified screening of passengers from affected African nations at the airport. While India has no reported cases, Gujarat has prepared isolation beds as a precaution.

title: NFL Trade Rumor: Chiefs, Bills linked to Cardinals’ $76M defensive star
content: The Arizona Cardinals’ star player, Josh Sweat, could be looking at joining a new team in the upcoming season as NFL insider Jordan Schultz recently reported that the team has been receiving trade calls for him after his impressive performance on the field in the last season. Amid this, Josh Sweat has now been linked to the Kansas City Chiefs and the Buffalo Bills for the new season.

title: Josh Jacobs fact check: Was Ash Kaashh tied to alleged DV arrest rumors
content: The Green Bay Packers’ star player Josh Jacobs has landed himself in major trouble after he was arrested on Tuesday in Brown County following a domestic disturbance investigation, just weeks before the new season begins. According to the Hobart-Lawrence Police Department, at approximately on 8:37am on last Saturday, police officers were dispatched for a situation involving Josh Jacobs. While the star player’s legal team has strongly denied all the allegations, popular influencer Ash Kaash has been dragged into the situation.

title: David Carle emerges as Maple Leafs’ top coach target amid Avs interest
content: Toronto Maple Leafs ‘Ramping Up Efforts’ To Land David Carle As Next Head Coach During NHL Offseason. However, interest from the Colorado Avalanche could make things a bit tricky. There is still speculation on Bruce Cassidy and a handful of potential NHL coaching vacancies across the league, but NHL insider Elliotte Friedman recently gave an update on Toronto’s coaching search.

title: Sensex bleeding, gold volatile amid US-Iran war: Time to opt for good old FDs?
content: Every crisis reminds us that markets can swing like a pendulum between greed and fear. Fixed income offers comfort in those phases and does its job as a stabiliser.

title: Beyond kamikaze strikes: These 17 Ukrainian UAVs are changing drone warfare
content: Ukraine is revolutionizing drone warfare, producing millions of advanced aerial, naval, and ground systems. Innovations include AI-guided interceptors, jet-powered strike drones for deep penetration, and naval kamikaze vessels. The widespread adoption of parachute recovery systems signifies a strategic shift towards reusable, cost-effective drone operations on the modern battlefield.

title: Red Wings goalie Sebastian Cossa’s NHL future uncertain amid Sabres buzz
content: Detroit Red Wings prospect Sebastian Cossa’s NHL status is up in the air after a checkered season. Buffalo Sabres forward Alex Tuch is still mulling his long-term future before hitting free agency. Both situations are becoming major NHL offseason storylines as roster planning, contract negotiations and player development continue to be key priorities heading into the upcoming NHL season.

title: 'Something going profoundly wrong':Suicides among ICE detainees hit record high
content: An Associated Press investigation reveals a surge in detainee suicides within ICE custody since January 2025, with at least 10 men dying by self-harm. Experts cite systemic failures in mental health care, delayed screenings, and isolation contributing to these preventable deaths.

title: Sooryavanshi breaks Chris Gayle’s IPL record, hits most sixes in a season
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has etched his name in IPL history, smashing Chris Gayle's 14-year-old record for most sixes in a season during the Eliminator. He also became the youngest to score 600 runs and the first to achieve this volume with a strike rate over 200.  This season is truly one for the ages.

title: Pam Bondi treated for Thyroid Cancer: Symptoms and risk factors explained
content: Former U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi is battling thyroid cancer, undergoing surgery and recovering well. The 60-year-old's diagnosis came shortly after her departure from the Justice Department. This report delves into the specifics of thyroid cancer, including its risk factors, common types like papillary and follicular, and treatment options, highlighting generally optimistic prognoses for most forms.

title: Happy Eid-ul-Adha 2026: Top 100 Eid Mubarak wishes and quotes for Bakrid
content: Navigating the flurry of Eid-ul-Adha greetings can be overwhelming. This guide offers 100 ready-to-use messages, from heartfelt family wishes and foodie friend prompts to professional greetings and quick replies.

title: Indian banks at higher risk from Middle East crisis, says Moody's
content: Moody's Ratings has identified Indian banks as highly exposed to Middle East crisis risks due to the nation's significant energy import dependence. Sustained high oil prices could pressure inflation, interest rates, and borrower cash flows, impacting loan quality. Despite these challenges, Indian banks possess adequate capital and provisioning buffers to absorb potential credit losses.

title: Woman’s body found stuffed inside blue drum in Punjab; tattoo helps identify victim
content: Police in Patiala recovered the body of 25-year-old Neha, found stuffed inside a blue plastic drum near the DMW Railway Colony. Her family identified her through social media photographs. Two local youths, known drug users often seen with the victim, have been detained for questioning.

title: Was Annamalai's rare dissent a message to BJP leadership in Delhi?
content: Former Tamil Nadu BJP chief K Annamalai publicly opposed the CBSE's revised three-language mandate, urging its withdrawal due to abrupt implementation. This move signals a calibrated political strategy to assert regional concerns and navigate the sensitive language issue in Tamil Nadu, potentially influencing the party's future leadership.

title: Balen Shah's two-month report card: Why Nepal’s Gen Z hero is under fire already
content: Two months into office, Nepal's Prime Minister Balendra Shah faces scrutiny as his ambitious reform agenda lags, with key promises marked "overdue." His administration grapples with cabinet instability, legal challenges over decisions, and criticism of his governing style, including bypassing institutions and controversial enforcement actions.

title: She met her ex once, her husband calls it adultery: Here is what the court said
content: A Punjab and Haryana High Court ruling clarifies that a single meeting with a former partner doesn't prove adultery. The court upheld a divorce granted on cruelty grounds, finding a wife's unsubstantiated allegations against her husband and his family constituted mental cruelty, despite rejecting the adultery claim.

title: What makes INS Kolkata formidable? The warship that foiled a piracy threat in the Indian Ocean
content: Inside INS Kolkata, the Indian Navy warship that foiled a piracy threat in the Indian OceanThe Indian Navy on Wednesday successfully foiled a suspected piracy attempt near merchant vessel MV Mashallah 1 in the Western Indian Ocean, once again putting spotlight on India’s growing maritime surveillance and rapid response capabilities in one of the world’s most strategically sensitive sea routes. The operation was carried out by Indian Naval Ship (INS) Kolkata, which is currently deployed in the Western Indian Ocean near the Gulf of Aden as part of the Navy’s anti-piracy mission.

title: 4 CPM workers arrested after attack on ED car during protest over raids at former Kerala CM’s house
content: CPI-M workers were arrested for allegedly attacking ED officials during protests outside former Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan's residence. The ED conducted searches in connection with the CMRL case, which Vijayan and Arvind Kejriwal criticized as a "targeted attack" and misuse of central agencies.

title: The trillion-dollar countdown: SpaceX’s race for the largest IPO in human history
content: SpaceX is preparing for a historic IPO, aiming for a $1.75-$2 trillion valuation and seeking to raise $75 billion by June 2026. Despite significant revenue growth from Starlink, the company reported substantial losses in 2025 and Q1 2026, largely due to heavy investments in its new AI unit following the xAI acquisition.

title: ‘I am unfit to play’- RR captain Riyan Parag drops shocking update at toss
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad elected to bowl first against Rajasthan Royals in the IPL 2026 Eliminator. RR skipper Riyan Parag revealed he's not fully fit but stressed the team's win-or-go-home mentality. SRH captain Pat Cummins expressed confidence in his team's recent form, aiming for simple bowling. Both teams have had mirroring seasons, with SRH holding a 2-0 advantage over RR this year.

title: Indian Idol 16: Vishal Dadlani replaced from singing reality show? Singer breaks silence
content: Amidst swirling whispers about Vishal Dadlani's departure from Indian Idol 16 linked to his bold comments on the NEET-UG paper leak, the artist set the record straight with a cheeky video straight from the stage, playfully advising followers to ignore the internet's buzz. He highlighted the necessity of voicing one's opinions, winning admiration from fans for his bravery.

title: Mekedatu dam & Tamil Nadu anthem: What Vijay discussed with PM Modi in 1st meeting as CM
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay urged Prime Minister Narendra Modi to block Karnataka's Mekedatu dam project without the consent of downstream states, citing farmer anxieties. He also sought clarity on singing the state anthem at government functions and requested the establishment of a Centre for Airborne Systems.

title: Zubeen Garg death case: Court frames murder charges against four accused,
content: A fast-track court in Assam has framed murder charges against four of the seven accused in singer Zubeen Garg's death case, with the trial set to begin June 8. This comes despite a Singapore court ruling his September 2025 death an accidental drowning with no foul play involved.

title: Karnataka CM tussle: Congress MLA says Siddaramaiah to quit tomorrow; DKS camp celebrates
content: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah is reportedly set to resign on Thursday after 3 PM, with Deputy Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar likely to take over. Congress MLA Ashok K Pattan indicated the decision follows directives from the party's high command. Supporters of Shivakumar celebrated across the state amid intense speculation about a leadership change.

title: Twisha Sharma death case: Bhopal court remands Samarth Singh to CBI custody, says lawyer
content: Twisha Sharma's husband, Samarth Singh, has been remanded to CBI custody in Bhopal following the agency's takeover of the former model-actor's death investigation. Sharma was found hanging at her marital home on May 12. Her family alleges harassment and domestic violence by her in-laws, who are named as accused.

title: ‘Virat Kohli is not human’- Ashwin’s hilarious yet stunning praise goes viral
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru secured a dominant victory over Gujarat Titans in IPL 2026 Qualifier 1, advancing to the final. Ravichandran Ashwin lauded Virat Kohli's electrifying on-field intensity and praised Krunal Pandya's crucial contribution. RCB's bowlers then stifled GT's chase, ensuring a comfortable win and a shot at defending their title.

title: Why India’s Chungreng Koren’s UFC dream resonates beyond his own journey
content: India’s Chungreng Koren has battled hardship for most of his life, from personal tragedy and poverty to career setbacks and inner demons. Determined to build a better future through MMA, the Manipuri fighter relentlessly pursued a dream that nearly slipped away through circumstances beyond his control. Now, with another chance at Road to UFC, Koren stands on the cusp of history once again. But for him, this journey is no longer just about personal ambition; it is about carrying the hopes of his family, his people and Indian MMA forward.

title: Trinamool MLA arrested, several leaders quit party post
content: The Trinamool leadership is  facing another challenge that despite being the principle Opposition party in the State with 80 MLAs, no room has been allocated Leader of Opposition Sovandeb Chattopadhyay in the premises of State Assembly

title: Union Minister stresses need to advance space technology in India
content: Speaking at the launch of Mission STRATO-XI, a near-space technology demonstration conducted at IGMC Stadium in Vijayawada, Ram Mohan Naidu describes the event as a landmark achievement

title: Police report flags suspected gold thefts at Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple
content: The primary findings detail that nearly 78 grams of gold bars and coins, donated to the shrine as offerings by devotees, have gone missing recently

title: ED freezes ₹18.36 crore and 242 bank accounts Exalogic-CMRL payoff case
content: Simultaneous raids were conducted across 10 locations in Kerala and Bengaluru on Wednesday. Raids yielded documents pertaining to investments and fixed deposits in banks, say ED sources

title: Indian Army, IAF contain major forest fire in Himachal’s Kasauli slopes
content: The combined operation stretched over 15 hours through the night and into the following day; no loss of life or injuries reported; operations are continuing over inaccessible stretches

title: Indian Army, IAF contain major forest fire in Himachal’s Kasauli slopes
content: The combined operation stretched over 15 hours through the night and into the following day; no loss of life or injuries reported; operations are continuing over inaccessible stretches

title: ED raids Pinarayi Vijayan's residences in CMRL-Exalogic case
content: The CPI(M) leadership strongly condemned the searches, challenging that the BJP-led union government was using Central agencies to target opposition leaders through politically motivated actions

title: Supreme Court upholds SIR exercise as an advancement towards free and fair elections
content: Court says EC can verify citizenship status for inclusion or exclusion from the electoral roll; it directs poll body to refer the names of Bihar electors purged from the rolls to the Centre for adjudication under the Citizenship Act

title: Kharge targets PM Modi over heatwave advisory, says people are suffering from ‘BJP-sponsored inflation’
content: Congress President Kharge criticises Prime Minister Narendra Modi, linking rising temperatures to ‘BJP-sponsored inflation’ affecting common people’s livelihoods

title: Government sanctions over 60% manpower boost for Enforcement Directorate
content: While special directors remain unchanged at seven, additional directors have increased from 10 to 24; joint directors from 28 to 49; and deputy directors from 148 to 267

title: Supreme Court Collegium recommends four High Court judges, woman advocate to top court
content: Currently, the Supreme Court has only one woman judge, Justice B.V. Nagarathna, who is also part of the Supreme Court Collegium; the Collegium resolution was published late on Wednesday (May 27, 2026)

title: UPSC for the first time releases provisional answer key for Civil Services Prelims exam
content: Representations may be submitted by indicating the correct answer key in the candidate’s understanding, along with a brief explanation and supporting documents from three authentic sources, the UPSC says

title: Supreme Court confirms organised online gaming comes under GST regime
content: A Bench of Justices J.B. Pardiwala and R. Mahadevan declined challenges raised against the levy of GST on actionable claims arising from organised online gaming activities and fantasy sports under the betting and gambling head

title: Suriya-starrer ‘Karuppu’ movie does not attract contempt law: Madras High Court
content: Justices G.R. Swaminathan and V. Lakshminarayanan say, it only portrays the presiding officer of an imaginary court as corrupt

title: Telangana Transport Minister flags off 60 EV buses, says TGSRTC merger process will begin after union elections
content: Representatives of recognised unions and officials to begin TGSRTC merger process after elections for recognised unions

title: Ban cow slaughter in Tamil Nadu with immediate effect, orders Madras High Court
content: Judges say, goats and sheeps too should not be allowed to be slaughtered in any place other than a licensed slaughter house

title: Message of ‘new-age school’ at Praveshanotsavam
content: Chief Minister V.D. Satheesan will inaugurate the Praveshanotsavam at Government Model Girls Higher Secondary School, Pattom, on June 1

title: Stalin, Kejriwal condemn raids, flay Congress for its questionable relations with BJP
content: CPI(M) General Secretary M.A. Baby’s questioned whether the UDF government was complicit in the raids at the residences of Pinarayi Vijayan

title: Demography panel chief says subject new to him, will consult experts
content: Retired Supreme Court judge Prakash Prabhakar Naolekar says he will call a meeting of all members soon, adds that demography and illegal migration are new subjects for him, and the scope of the study is vast

title: Karnataka truck operators urge government to cut toll, VAT as diesel prices soar; no freight hike for now
content: The associations say the continuous increase in fuel prices has pushed truck operators and drivers into severe financial distress and could trigger a rise in freight charges if no relief measures were announced soon.

title: Amid leadership change developments, Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah receives caste survey report
content: This gains particular significance in light of Siddaramaiah’s legacy as a tall leader of the OBC bloc, and the report being viewed as part of his legacy

title: Watch: ED raids on Pinarayi: Why the Left alleges a Congress-BJP nexus | Above the Fold | 27.05.2026
content: In today’s episode, we look at the ED raids linked to former Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan, the latest Karnataka leadership shuffle developments, and the SC upholding the SIR process, to U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham’s remarks on Pakistan’s mediation role, and more.

title: Govt. issues PPP guidelines for urban infrastructure projects
content: MAUD identifies 56 projects worth ₹23,801 crore in two phases; CRDA projects worth ₹17,484 crore also lined up under private participation models

title: Expert IIT team to submit report after ‘full check-up’ of CBSE’s tech ecosystem
content: The expert team will provide recommendations to the CBSE on how to carry out processes, including re-totalling of marks and re-evaluation of questions, V. Kamakoti, Director, IIT Madras says

title: Demolish illegal structures in 15 km of border with Pakistan: Amit Shah in Rajasthan
content: The Home Minister holds a high-level security review meeting with DM and SPs from Bikaner, Jaisalmer, Barmer, Sri Ganganagar, and Phalodi districts. It focused on enhanced and comprehensive border management

title: CPI(M) workers take to the streets in Kozhikode against ED raid at Riyas’ house
content: CPI(M) workers gathered outside the residence and later took out protest marches in Kozhikode, alleging that the raids conducted by the ED were politically motivated

title: Pothundy twin murder case trial enters final phase
content: Case pertains to the murder of Sudhakaran and his mother Lakshmi at their house at Boyan Colony, Pothundy, near Nenmara, by their neighbour Chenthamara

title: Central University to offer six new postgraduate programmes
content: Vice-Chancellor Battu Satyanarayana announces a new ‘earn while learning’ initiative promoting self-reliance, skill development

title: SUCC urges Governor to halt DUK BoG meeting, questions Chairman’s legal tenure
content: Petition alleges May 29 Board meeting is “prima facie illegal” as BoG Chairman Prof. Vijay Chandru’s statutory term has expired

title: Heatwave eases briefly in Andhra Pradesh, severe conditions likely to return on May 28
content: Relief from temperatures above 45°C brings respite across most districts, but IMD and APSDMA warn of severe heatwave conditions in over 100 mandals on Thursday and Friday

title: Girl, 13, Jumps From 4th Floor Of Residential Building In Surat, Dies
content: Preliminary reports indicate that a domestic dispute had broken out within the household shortly before the incident.

title: "Not Spontaneous": Probe Team On Attack During Kerala Searches
content: "During the search operation, one of the ED teams was attacked by a group of people after the conclusion of the operation at the premises of Veena and P Vijayan at Thiruvananthapuram," the Enforcement Directorate said

title: Gujarat Woman Killed Her 3 Children Before Suicide Attempt, Claims Husband
content: The father of the children, Sanjay Halpati, has leveled grave allegations against his wife, accusing her of murdering their three children before attempting to end her own life.

title: BJP Calls Congress "Anti-Hindu" Over Digvijaya Singh's "Communalism" Remark
content: The BJP's remarks came after Digvijaya Singh - at an event held on Jawaharlal Nehru's death anniversary - said "majoritarian communalism is far more dangerous than minority communalism"

title: Iran's Big Claim On Deal To Reopen Hormuz, US Calls It "Fabrication"
content: The Iranian state television cited what it said was the draft of a potential "memorandum of understanding". However, it clarified that the text had not been "finalised" as of yet.

title: On Camera, Cops Parade Criminals On Bengal Streets In Their Underwear
content: Over the last days, the Bengal police have been observed parading criminals in a semi-nude state through the streets of North, South, and Central Howrah.

title: Indian Startup's Experimental Balloon Platform Rises 25 km Above Earth
content: Red Balloon Aerospace is also developing a broader suite of platforms, including tethered aerostats and long-endurance airships.

title: Worsening Climate Change Among Factors Behind India's Extreme Heat: UN
content: The ongoing extreme heat across large parts of India is primarily driven by worsening climate change caused by the massive burning of coal, oil, and gas, UN climate chief Simon Stiell said on Wednesday.

title: Navy Foils Piracy Attempt In Indian Ocean, Saves Merchant Ship
content: INS Kolkata -- Indian Navy's guided missile destroyer -- has thwarted a piracy attempt in the western Indian Ocean with a timely intervention that ensured safety of a merchant vessel, officials said on Wednesday.

title: Exclusive: Ex-Aide's Big Charge Against Mamata Banerjee, Nephew Abhishek
content: "Mamata Banerjee overlooked all corruption. And both Mamata and Abhishek Banerjee are responsible for such result," Partha Chatterjee told NDTV

title: 'Resonates Deeply With Us': Manipur Leaders Welcome Centre's Panel To Check Demographic Shifts
content: Manipur Chief Minister Y Khemchand Singh said that for border states like Manipur, concerns over illegal immigration and abnormal demographic changes have long been significant

title: Ayushman Bharat, Education Policy Discussed At Delhi Workshop For Lawmakers
content: Healthcare reforms, implementation of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 and the growing role of digital communication in politics dominated discussions at a workshop attended by nearly 80 MPs and MLAs in the national capital on Monday.

title: In Vijay's 20-Minute Meeting With PM, Requests On State Anthem, Mekedatu
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay met with Prime Minister Narendra Modi today in Delhi on his first official visit to the national capital after coming to power earlier this month

title: Xi Vowed To Curb Smoking, But Cigarette Sales Tell A Different China Story
content: China's cigarette packaging also looks strikingly different from that in many countries. Instead of graphic health warnings, packs typically feature a single-line caution alongside national imagery such as pandas or the Gate of Heavenly Peace.

title: Mumbai Boy Attacks Friend With Machete Over Alleged 'Chatting' With Mother
content: Since the accused is a minor, the police detained him for questioning and then sent him to the juvenile detention home in Dongri

title: Amid Eid Fervour In Kashmir, Jamia Mosque Closed Again For Prayers
content: Mirwaiz Umar Farooq, the chief cleric of the mosque, was also placed under house arrest ahead of Eid and strongly criticised the restrictions, calling them "a systematic assault on religious identity, dignity, and fundamental rights."

title: Ladakh Lieutenant Governor Warns Sonam Wangchuk Against "Misleading Narrative"
content: As political negotiations continue, the latest exchange between the Lieutenant Governor and Sonam Wangchuk underlines the growing tension between the Centre's push for development and local groups demanding stronger constitutional safeguards

title: Russian Lawmakers Want Banks, Their Staff To Help Fight Ukrainian Drones
content: Russian bank staff and branches could be joining the fight against Ukrainian drone attacks under an ambitious plan approved by the country's lower house of parliament.

title: Iran Says "Low" Possibility Of Return To War With US
content: Iran's Revolutionary Guards said on Wednesday that a return to war with the United States was unlikely, but warned the Islamic republic stood ready to respond to any attack.

content: 127 councillors from 11 civic bodies have quit so far . four-time MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar attended an administrative meeting of the CM in an apparent act of defiance . the turmoil continued later as two TMC MLAs held a closed-door "courtesy" meeting in the chamber of Rathindra Bose .

title: Anti-drone system on Pakistan border in 6 months: Amit Shah
content: home minister promises faster deployment of advanced surveillance systems, anti-drone technology and upgraded infrastructure along India’s western frontier . he inaugurates new barracks for women personnel of BSF during a visit to forward posts in Rajasthan bordering Pakistan .
